text:
top has an option to display threads by using "H". 

in the display from top; there is a number followed by the word "processes" however when enabling "display threads" the number is correct however the word "processes" remains and should be "threads"

Fix: 

Simple, change the printf() that displays the "processes" text based on the processes/threads display mode
How-To-Repeat: launch top, press "H"
